name: skill-path-architect-root
description: Skill Path Architect root concurrent runner

scripts.ensure:models: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const cp=require('child_process');const m='ai/models/career_prediction_model.h5';const e='ai/models/career_label_encoder.h5';if(!fs.existsSync(m)||!fs.existsSync(e)){console.log('Training AI models (first run)...');cp.execSync('python ai/train.py -i ai/dataset/dataset_skill_predictor.csv -m ai/models/career_prediction_model.h5',{stdio:'inherit'});}"
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others "npm run dev:ai" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:frontend"
